serverInfo.name: insurance-sales-mcp
serverInfo.description: Hong Kong Insurance Sales Advisory MCP Server with GL-44/GL34 compliance engines. 11 professional tools for private domain lead gen, client needs assessment, and regulatory-compliant sales automation.

authentication.notes: stdio transport requires no auth. HTTP mode uses Bearer token in Authorization header.

tools.name: product_query
tools.description: Query Hong Kong insurance product specifications and features

tools.name: compliance_check
tools.description: Check content against GL-44 red-line (14 rules) and yellow-line (4 rules) compliance standards

tools.name: gl34_compliance_check
tools.description: Execute GL-34 specific compliance engine for insurance advisor certification requirements

tools.name: needs_assessment
tools.description: Multi-turn customer needs assessment with A-D grading system

tools.name: objection_handler
tools.description: Generate compliant objection handling scripts (6 categories, 3 tiers)

tools.name: private_sop_runner
tools.description: Execute private domain SOP workflows with approval gates

tools.name: compliance_rewrite
tools.description: Auto-rewrite non-compliant content into compliant expressions

tools.name: lifecycle_analyzer
tools.description: D0-D30 customer lifecycle stage analysis and recommendations

tools.name: client_crm_tag
tools.description: Multi-dimensional CRM client tagging and segmentation

tools.name: multi_turn_dialogue
tools.description: Stateful multi-turn insurance consultation with per-turn compliance check

tools.name: compliance_trend_analysis
tools.description: Historical compliance violation pattern analysis and trend reporting
